top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Nvidia may still be tech’s king, but Micron just stole a scene
top_signals.summary: Micron overtakes Nvidia and Meta to be Wall Street's new margin king
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Thailand Emerges as Southeast Asia’s Surprise AI Stock Winner
top_signals.summary: Thailand’s stock market is having the best year among Southeast Asian peers, as investors discover an unlikely source of exposure to the global artificial-intelligence boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
